gist.headline: Fresh pixels in the greenhouse
gist.blurb: A new AI Image Generator app just sprouted in the community greenhouse. Built with React and Cloudflare Workers, it features deterministic seed generation for smooth pixel-pushing.
gist.summary: Added the AI-Image-Generator app to the community showcase, featuring a React frontend and Cloudflare Workers backend.
gist.impact: Users can explore a new community-built image generation tool with deterministic seeds and built-in rate limiting.
gist.visual_concept: A new app added to the 'Greenhouse' (community apps). Depict Polly the bee as a gardener in a greenhouse, tending to a new plant that grows a glowing picture frame (representing the image generator).
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny gardener's apron, watering a glowing code-plant inside a glass greenhouse. The plant is blooming into a tiny, colorful picture frame. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
